title: KeycloakClient
content:
# KeycloakClient


Client for interacting with Keycloak OAuth/OIDC endpoints


## Methods


### __init__(base_url: str, realm: str, client_id: str, client_secret: Optional[str]) -> Any


### get_oidc_configuration() -> Dict

Fetch the OIDC configuration from Keycloak's well-known endpoint.


### get_authorization_endpoint() -> str

Get the authorization endpoint URL.


### get_token_endpoint() -> str

Get the token endpoint URL.


### exchange_code_for_tokens(code: str, redirect_uri: str, code_verifier: str) -> Dict

Exchange an authorization code for access and refresh tokens.


### authenticate_with_password(username: str, password: str, totp: Optional[str]) -> Dict

Authenticate using Resource Owner Password Credentials Grant.


### authenticate_with_client_credentials(client_id: str, client_secret: str) -> Dict

Authenticate using Client Credentials Grant.


### refresh_access_token(refresh_token: str) -> Dict

Refresh the access token using a refresh token.


### get_user_info(access_token: str) -> Dict

Fetch user information from Keycloak's userinfo endpoint.


### validate_token(access_token: str) -> bool

Validate an access token by making a request to the userinfo endpoint.


### logout(refresh_token: str) -> None

Logout by invalidating the refresh token at Keycloak's logout endpoint.
summary: Client for interacting with Keycloak OAuth/OIDC endpoints
